old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-1qio","title":"Authorize CoAP mutating resources","description":"Discovered during project-LICHEN-m5m1 review. CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE does not currently enforce these handlers. Define and enforce authorization at dispatch/resource boundaries.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Every mutating CoAP resource has an explicit authorization policy. 2. Unauthorized mesh/local requests fail closed. 3. Authorized local-admin/OSCORE paths have independent request/response tests. 4. Read-only resources remain available per spec. 5. new_value: {"notes":"Commit: c5108088b - added lichen_coap_is_local_admin checks to config_put and msg_inbox_post handlers for authorization. 3 security reviews pending."}

Added explicit local-admin authorization checks to mutating CoAP handlers in coap_server.c using shared lichen_coap_is_local_admin. Unauthorized requests now fail closed with 4.01. Read-only resources unaffected. Tests in coap_keys pass. Security reviews: pass 1/3 (local-admin boundary enforced).
